sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15627" key="a)rtibrefh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρτι-βρεφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n15627.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ofyoung children,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀρτιτρεφής.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
